bird.name: Camiguin boobook
bird.summary: The Camiguin boobook or Camiguin hawk-owl (Ninox leventisi) is an owl species resident to the Camiguin island in the Philippines. It is the…

relations.subject: Camiguin boobook
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of legal and illegal logging, mining and conversion into farmlands through Slash-and-burn and urbanization mostly due to an influx of tourists which have forced these birds to the uplands
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Camiguin boobook

relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
